title: cynoglossum paniculatum f. azocartii
intro: Cynoglossum paniculatum f. azocartii, also known as Hairy Hound's Tongue, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the borage family, Boraginaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hairy Hound's Tongue include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and promote wound healing. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin problems and respiratory issues.
